common.nameExists: A record with this name already exists.

icon.errBadType: Only PNG, JPEG, or SVG images are allowed.
icon.errTooLarge: Image must be smaller than 256 KB.

channels.title: Channels
channels.lead: Upstream API channels: base URL, auth, protocol.

fields.name: Name
fields.baseUrlHint: Leave blank to use the vendor default.
fields.apiKeyHintEdit: Leave blank to keep the saved key.

channels.editorDescriptionNew: Routes a vendor format to a base URL.
channels.editorDescriptionEdit: Update the channel. Leave the API key blank to keep the existing secret.

models.title: Models
models.lead: Models shown in the picker (chat / image / embedding).
models.empty: No models yet — create a channel first, then add models that hang off it.
models.newDialogLead: Just the essentials; tune the rest later.

fields.label: Display label
fields.officialToolsHint: OpenAI runs its built-in tools instead of the system ones.
fields.imageTimeoutHint: Cut a single image request after this many seconds. 0 = no per-model cap.

models.removeBody: Deletes “{{label}}”. Existing chats stay readable but can't continue.

errors.missingFields: Channel, label and request_id are required

models.permissionsLead: Which groups may use this model, and their per-cycle quota. All off = open to everyone.
models.tagsHint: Tag the model for the picker's filter.
models.skillsHint: Checked skills are advertised; the model loads them on demand via use_skill.

skills.title: Skills
skills.lead: Reusable how-tos the model loads on demand.

fields.name: Name
fields.whenHint: Goes into the prompt index — write it as a trigger.
fields.importMdHint: Paste a SKILL.md (with frontmatter) to auto-fill.

skills.importFailed: Couldn't parse — check the SKILL.md format.

errors.missingFields: Name, description and instructions are required.
errors.nameExists: A skill with this name already exists.

oauth.title: Login methods
oauth.lead: Third-party sign-in (Google/GitHub/Apple/OIDC). Appears on the login page once set.
oauth.empty: No login methods yet — users sign in with email + password.

fields.name: Button label
fields.clientSecretHintEdit: Leave blank to keep the saved secret.
fields.redirectUriHint: Add this to the provider's redirect URIs.
fields.redirectUriNew: Save the method first — the redirect URI to register with the provider appears once it has an ID.

hints.google: Create an OAuth client in Google Cloud → Credentials.
hints.github: Create one in GitHub → Developer settings → OAuth Apps.
hints.apple: Create a Services ID + AuthKey (.p8) in Apple Developer.
hints.oidc: Client credentials + authorize / token / userinfo endpoints.

oauth.removeBody: Deletes “{{name}}”. Accounts it created still work.

users.title: Users
users.lead: Create accounts, change roles, reset passwords, ban.
users.newLead: Creates an account directly, no email verification.
users.selfRoleHint: You can't change your own role.

fields.name: Name
fields.passwordEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
fields.permanentCreditsHint: Never-expiring credits, spent after timed ones.
fields.groupHint: Determines which models this member can use and their quotas.
fields.groupExpiryHint: Leave empty for a permanent membership.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

users.deleteBody: Permanently deletes “{{title}}” and all its messages.
users.conversationsLead: View all of this user's conversations (read-only).
users.twofaHint: Reset if the member lost their authenticator device.
users.libraryLead: Projects and knowledge bases owned by this user. Read-only.

usage.title: Usage
usage.lead: Per-call usage, costed by model price.
usage.empty: No calls in the selected window.
usage.leadRecords: Every API call, one row. Filter and prune the log below.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete these usage records?
deleteConfirm.body: This permanently deletes the {{count}} record(s) matching the current filter. This cannot be undone.

documents.title: Documents
documents.lead: Settings that turn uploads into searchable context.
documents.embeddingLead: Embedding model for KB vectors. Changing it affects only new chunks.
documents.ragLead: Control when an uploaded document is injected whole vs. retrieved by relevance, and how much is injected.
documents.ragFullTextThresholdHint: A document at/below this estimated size is injected in full every turn; above it, the document is vectorized and only relevant chunks are retrieved.
documents.ragTopKHint: How many chunks to retrieve for a vectorized document (when dynamic Top-K is off).
documents.ragDynamicTopkHint: Instead of a fixed K, inject every retrieved chunk whose similarity clears the threshold.
documents.ragSimThresholdHint: Cosine-similarity cutoff. Chunks scoring at/above this are injected.
documents.preflightLead: For credit-charged turns, estimate the request size before generating and refuse if the user can't afford it.

tools.title: Tools
tools.lead: External services the assistant calls during a conversation.

audio.title: Voice
audio.lead: Speech-to-text for the composer mic, via an OpenAI-compatible transcription endpoint.

fields.modelHint: e.g. whisper-1; sent as the model.
fields.baseUrlHint: Default https://api.openai.com. Any OpenAI-compatible audio endpoint works.
fields.apiKeyHint: Bearer key for the endpoint. Empty disables voice input.

settings.title: Global settings
settings.lead: A few platform-wide knobs: default/task model, compaction, signups, quotas.

fields.taskModelHint: Used for titles, query routing, compression summaries, memory triage.
fields.tokenTriggerHint: Compact earlier turns once the prompt exceeds this many tokens. 0 = off.
fields.registerCaptchaHint: New signups must solve a slider puzzle.
fields.registerIpDailyLimitHint: Max accounts one IP address can create per day. 0 = unlimited.
fields.emailVerificationHint: New registrations must verify their email with a 6-digit code before signing in.
fields.domainWhitelistHint: Comma-separated. Only these domains can register. Leave empty to allow all.
fields.smtpFromHint: Sender shown to recipients. Defaults to the username.
fields.smtpTlsHint: On for port 465. Port 587 uses STARTTLS (off).
fields.sandboxUrlHint: Empty = bundled sandbox. Set only to point at an external one.
fields.sandboxKeyHint: Bearer key for the sandbox. Empty = built-in key.
fields.sandboxExecTimeoutHint: Max seconds per run. Empty = 120. Range 10–600.
fields.storageLead: Where recycled sandbox workspaces are archived. Pick one; empty disables archiving.
fields.storageProviderHint: Local disk (default), S3-compatible (AWS, MinIO, etc.), or Aliyun OSS.
fields.storagePrefixHint: Object key prefix for archives, e.g. workspaces/
fields.storageArchiveTtlHint: Auto-delete archives older than this many days. 0 = keep forever.
fields.s3EndpointHint: Optional. Required for MinIO / non-AWS endpoints.
fields.mineruLead: Non-text uploads (PDF/Office/images) are parsed by MinerU via your storage bucket.
fields.mineruBaseUrlHint: Cloud default: https://mineru.net. Or point at your gateway.
fields.mineruTokenHint: Create one in the MinerU console (API management).
fields.searchLead: Backend for the web_search tool. SearXNG is self-hosted and keyless; Serper / Brave are paid.
fields.searchProviderHint: SearXNG needs only a base URL. Serper / Brave need an API key.
fields.uploadsLead: Allowed upload extensions. Empty = safe defaults (PDF/Office/images/text).
fields.uploadAllowedExtHint: Comma/space separated, case-insensitive. e.g. pdf, docx, png
fields.fallbackModelHint: If the chosen model returns nothing in time, answer with this one instead (transparent to the user).
fields.fallbackTtftHint: Cut the upstream after this many seconds with no output. 0 = off.
fields.imagePromptModelHint: Text model that refines image prompts before drawing. None = skip.
fields.verifyModelHint: Second model that fact-checks answers in Verify mode. None = Verify off.
fields.storageLocalNote: Zero-config persistence: recycled workspaces are archived to the sandbox server's mounted directory (SANDBOX_LOCAL_STORAGE_DIR) — no external object store needed. Single-node only; use S3/OSS for multi-replica deployments. MinerU document parsing still requires an object store.
fields.sandboxIdleTtlHint: Recycle a sandbox after this many idle seconds (its workspace is archived first). Empty = 1800 (30 min). Range 60–86400.

groups.title: User Groups
groups.lead: Membership tiers: price + features. Per-model quotas live on the model page.
groups.groupBuyUrlHint: “Buy” link on paid tier cards. Empty shows “contact admin”.
groups.quotaMsgHint: Shown when a user hits this model's quota.
groups.quotaMsgPlaceholder: You’ve reached your plan’s limit for this model. Upgrade your plan to continue.
groups.editorLead: Name, price and features are shown to members on the subscription page.
groups.removeBody: Members move to the free group. Can't be undone.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: For power users who need more headroom
fields.researchHint: Allow this group to use the Deep Research mode.
fields.featuresHint: One per line. Shown as a checklist on the subscription page.
fields.featuresPlaceholder:
Priority access
Higher usage limits
Early features
fields.creditsLead: Timed allowance granted each cycle, and the cycle length.
fields.creditAllowanceHint: Timed credits granted each refresh; unused are voided.
fields.creditPeriodHint: How often timed credits reset to the allowance.
fields.workspacesHint: Allow this group to create workspaces (max above; 0 = unlimited).
fields.isPublicHint: When off, this tier is hidden from the public subscription page (members keep their plan).

quota.restrictedHint: Only enabled groups can use it; others see it locked.
quota.openHint: No groups enabled — open to everyone.
quota.unlimitedHint: Set to 0 for unlimited within the window.
quota.capHint: Cap per window for this group.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.lead: Usage trends: overall, by model, by user.
analytics.empty: No usage in this period yet.

announcement.title: Announcement
announcement.lead: A global notice shown when users open the app.
announcement.enabledHint: When off, no notice is shown.
announcement.rememberHint: Off = shows again on every visit.
announcement.imageHint: Paste a link or upload (PNG/JPG, ≤256 KB).
announcement.bodyHint:
HTML allowed. Use
for line breaks.
announcement.bodyPlaceholder: What do you want users to know?

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.lead: Screen each prompt before generation. Toggle per model on the model page.
moderation.keywordsHint: One keyword per line; any match blocks.
moderation.modelHint: Model used for allow/block in “model” mode.
moderation.categoriesHint: One category per line (e.g. politics, sexual, violence).
moderation.messageHint: Shown to the user when a prompt is blocked.

redeemCodes.title: Redeem codes
redeemCodes.lead: Generate codes that grant a group + duration.
redeemCodes.empty: No codes yet — generate a batch to hand out.

fields.batchNameHint: Internal label so you can find this batch later. Not shown to redeemers.
fields.quantityHint: How many codes to generate in this batch (1–1000).
fields.groupHint: The user group a redeemer is moved to.
fields.durationDaysHint: How long the membership lasts after redemption. Leave 0 for permanent.
fields.expiresAtHint: Unredeemed codes expire after this. Empty = never.
fields.notePlaceholder: Anything you want to remember about this batch

redeemCodes.newLead: Each code grants the configured group + duration.
redeemCodes.batchRemoveBody: Permanently deletes every code in this batch.

sandbox.title: Sandbox files
sandbox.none: No sandbox session for this conversation.
sandbox.unavailable: Session expired or sidecar does not support file listing.

backup.title: Backup & Migration
backup.lead: Export/import a portable DB archive — migrate across servers and SQLite/PostgreSQL.

export.title: Export backup
export.lead: Export all tables as a portable archive.

import.title: Import & restore
import.lead: Upload an archive exported above to load it into this deployment.
import.warning: Replaces ALL existing data. Irreversible — back up first.
import.successSummary: Restored {{rows}} rows across all tables and {{files}} files.
import.reloginNote: Your session has ended — signing you out. Sign in again with an account from the imported data.

confirm.title: Replace all data?
confirm.lead: Permanently overwrites all records with the uploaded archive.

export.title: Export configuration
export.lead: Download all site settings as a JSON file. Secrets are redacted.

import.title: Import configuration
import.lead: Apply settings from a config JSON exported above. Merges into the current config — redacted secrets are left unchanged.
import.invalid: That file isn't a valid Aurelia configuration export.
import.confirmLead: Overwrites the current site settings with the values from this file.
import.confirmDetail: {{file}} — {{count}} settings will be applied. Redacted secrets stay unchanged.

modelTags.title: Model Tags
modelTags.lead: Create tags to assign to models for the picker's filter.
modelTags.empty: No tags yet. Add one above.
modelTags.emptyHint: No tags yet — create them on the Model Tags page.

imageStyles.title: Image styles
imageStyles.lead: Looks users can pick when drawing. The style prompt is hidden from users.
imageStyles.empty: No styles yet. Add one above.
imageStyles.name: Name
imageStyles.hiddenPromptPlaceholder: e.g. soft watercolor, textured paper, muted palette

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.subtitle: Every collaborative space, its owner and member count.
workspaces.emptyBody: Users create workspaces from the sidebar avatar menu.
workspaces.deleteBody: Every conversation, project and knowledge base inside is removed and all members lose access. This cannot be undone.
